top_signals.title: Thai Shipper Remains Wary of Hormuz Despite Ceasefire
top_signals.summary: Bangkok-based Precious Shipping Pcl, whose vessel was struck in March by Iranian projectiles in the Strait of Hormuz, said it remains cautious about sending ships through one of the world’s most important energy and trade chokepoints.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wars trigger $12bn venture capital rush into defence tech
top_signals.summary: Plus, Thoma Bravo’s PE wipeout, dollar bullishness post Fed decision and Alexander Calder in Paris
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ATP chair warns tennis divide leads to billions in lost revenue
top_signals.summary: Andrea Gaudenzi says professional sport’s $3.5bn annual turnover could double if tours and tournaments combine forces
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: What would a stablecoin run look like?
top_signals.summary: Fire sales of assets held in reserve could trigger problems in many other financial markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon on the new world of AI agents
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Arjun Kharpal sits down with the chip company chief on The Tech Download podcast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Taiko urges users to withdraw as bridge exploit drains $1.7M
top_signals.summary: Taiko’s bridge and ERC20 Vault on Ethereum suffered a compromise in its chain state verification mechanism, allowing forged proofs and unauthorized withdrawals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Leverage in the financial system, revisited
